description: Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 roadmap discipline enforcement implementation. Created governance/roadmap_discipline_enforcement.md on main branch with comprehensive enforcement mechanisms: (1) Blocker-first priority discipline requiring all BLOCKED tasks to be resolved before new task initiation; (2) Truth-priority verification discipline mandating VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events for all ACTION_COMPLETED tasks; (3) Autonomous operation consistency discipline enforcing schema_version v164 across all events; (4) Ledger integrity discipline requiring parent_event_id chains and commit_sha references; (5) Role transition discipline ensuring proper next_actor_role and next_expected_event routing. Document includes enforcement checkpoints, violation detection patterns, and remediation protocols to maintain system discipline across all autonomous operations.
